title: FastAPI Basics
text: FastAPI is a Python framework used to build APIs quickly. It provides automatic OpenAPI docs, validation through Pydantic, and a developer-friendly routing model.

title: Docker Compose Overview
text: Docker Compose helps run multiple services together like API, database and vector database.

title: Qdrant and Retrieval
text: Qdrant stores embeddings as vectors and allows similarity search over them with metadata.
